title: Day 1 Forecast Discussion
discussion:
Thunderstorms are expected for E Slovakia and E Hungary on July 2nd 2026, with the highest risk being GNRL

The same system that brought multi-day severe weather outbreak to central Europe is coming to an end with much weaker force.

GNRL
E Slovakia & E Hungary
Thunderstorms are expected in this region, with most of them being weak, but locally could be stronger with hail and heavy rain, mostly in slovakia.
